failures.description: The ProductCatalogSearch dependency timed out, so the agent could not obtain the catalog count needed to answer the user.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the correct goal and invoked the correct ProductCatalogSearch tool with well-formed arguments. The failure occurred when the tool returned an explicit timeout: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, with message "catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms". This is an infrastructure/connectivity-style dependency failure, not a malformed invocation, guardrail block, misunderstanding, or hallucination. The error was not resolved later; the agent simply reported that the task could not be completed.
